completion_summary: Completed the evidence-only repository readiness decision artifact. DECISION-20260710-0001 records that CAP-0006/CAP-0007/CAP-0008 evidence supports proposing a separate governed context-pack integration plan, while preserving selection_effect none and blocking all runtime, provider prompt, persistence, retrieval, embedding, reranking, index, memory-store, runtime-manifest, and automatic context inclusion changes.
constraints: No persisted graph node or edge writes.
Any integration must be a separate governed plan with its own admission warrant.
expected_outputs: A repository-tracked graph-neighborhood readiness decision artifact.
Tests proving the artifact is evidence-only and has no context-selection effect.
A completion record deciding whether a separate integration proposal is justified.
next_action: Keep GAP-0002 open. The next governed step is to propose a separate context-pack integration plan for graph-local scoped memory if desired; do not implement integration without a new admission warrant.
non_goals: Adding retrieval, embeddings, reranking, or index mutation.
objective: Create a repository-tracked evidence-only readiness decision artifact using CAP-0007. The artifact should decide whether the available CAP-0006/CAP-0007 evidence justifies proposing a separate context-pack integration plan for graph-local scoped memory.
proposed_change: Create a repository-tracked evidence-only graph-neighborhood readiness decision artifact using CAP-0007 and CAP-0006 evidence. The artifact will decide only whether a separate governed context-pack integration plan should be proposed for graph-local scoped memory. It will not implement context-pack integration, runtime context selection changes, provider prompt changes, graph persistence, retrieval, embeddings, reranking, production index mutation, memory-store mutation, runtime-manifest mutation, or automatic context inclusion.
rationale: CAP-0007 provides evidence-only readiness decision semantics but does not itself create a repository-tracked decision artifact.
A repository-tracked readiness decision artifact is the next safe governed step before any separate context-pack integration proposal is considered.

The plan remains evidence-only and explicitly blocks integration, runtime selection changes, prompt changes, persistence, retrieval, embeddings, reranking, index mutation, memory-store mutation, runtime-manifest mutation, and automatic context inclusion.
risk: The main risk is mistaking an evidence-only readiness decision for approval to implement context-pack integration or runtime context selection. This plan mitigates that risk by explicitly blocking integration, prompt changes, persistence, retrieval, embeddings, reranking, index mutation, memory-store mutation, runtime-manifest mutation, and automatic context inclusion.
scope: Produce a bounded repository artifact recording the readiness decision.
Record the evidence used for the decision.
Decide only whether a separate governed context-pack integration plan should be proposed.
Keep GAP-0002 open unless a separate future plan explicitly closes it.
success_criteria: The readiness decision artifact is deterministic and repository-tracked.
The artifact explicitly blocks integration/runtime behaviors.
The full test suite and self-model audit pass.
title: Create graph neighborhood repository readiness decision artifact
